image:image.image:caption: Whatever it is, the way you tell your story online can make all the difference.

image:image.image:title: Events - Carterhatch Coffee Morning ☕ - Thank you so much for your interest in my Carterhatch coffee morning surgery. Unfortunately the event is now oversubscribed, so please do keep an eye on my website for future coffee morning surgeries. If you need immediate help please do email feryal.clark.mp@parliament.uk ☕
Events - Enfield Lock Coffee Morning ☕ - Applications are now closed for the coffee morning in Enfield Lock, but please do look out for further coffee mornings in the future.
Events - Brimsdown Coffee Morning ☕ - I am hosting my next coffee morning event in Brimsdown on Saturday 30th August 2025 ☕
image:image.image:caption: Everyone is more than welcome to join and have a chat with me about all of the important issues we face in Enfield. I’ll be happy to help with any local issues, and my caseworkers are on hand to take down any personal cases to progress on your behalf. I will also be joined by your Brimsdown Councillors Hivran Dalkaya, Ahmet Hasan & Bektas Ozer. If you are interested in coming along, please fill in the form below and I will get back to you with location details close to the event.
